title: Masterplast 100 Waterproof Mixed Plasters Washable First Aid Dressings
features: WATERPROOF: Masterplast Assorted Sized Waterproof Plasters are ideal dressings for use in and around water. Total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming. Inlcudes a variety of sizes for cuts and grazes
PROTECT: Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, whilst being protected from water and other liquids.
ABSORB & HEAL: Durable waterproof top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, four sizes to suit a variety of cuts and grazes. Plasters sizes , box contains 100 plasters
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 100 Plasters
description: Product Description Masterplast Assorted Sized Plasters are waterproof , these are ideal dressings for use in and around water. Total protection in the shower, whilst washing and swimming. Inlcudes a variety of sizes for cuts and grazes. Each plaster is air permeable allowing the wound to breathe, aiding the healing process, whilst being protected from water and other liquids. Durable waterproof top layer with an absorbent wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals. Individually wrapped for safety, four sizes to suit a variety of cuts and grazes. Box 100 assorted plasters Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster directly to the skin, and secure it in place.
